rebel_influence.name: Rebel Influence
rebel_influence.description: Political and social progress of the Rebel Alliance in this sector. Advanced through diplomacy, social encounters, and completing mission objectives.

thresholds.description: Local sympathizers provide training tips (+1 XP per mission)

reward.description: A network of sympathizers across the sector offers safe passage.
A seasoned Rebel diplomat joins your cause.

thresholds.description: Widespread support means better prices everywhere (-15% shop prices)
The sector is ready for liberation

imperial_destabilization.name: Imperial Destabilization
imperial_destabilization.description: Military weakening of Imperial control in the sector. Advanced through combat victories, enemy eliminations, and destroying Imperial assets.

thresholds.description: Imperial garrison thinned (-1 threat per mission)
Captured Imperial officer's sidearm available in shops
Imperial command structure fractured (-2 additional threat per mission)

reward.description: The Imperial garrison is on the verge of collapse.

resource_control.name: Resource Control
resource_control.description: Economic and supply chain dominance in the sector. Advanced through collecting loot, investing credits, and purchasing projects.

thresholds.description: Trade routes secured (+3 credits per mission)
Weapons shipment arrives: heavy blaster rifle available
Medical supply surplus (-15 credits for medical recovery)
